full_description: EventPlanner is a simple event planning app that helps users organize and manage events, parties, and gatherings. It provides a convenient way to track guest lists, RSVPs, and event details. With EventPlanner, you can create and manage events, send invitations, and keep track of who's attending. The app also allows you to add event details such as date, time, location, and notes. Additionally, you can set reminders and notifications to ensure you stay on top of your event planning tasks. Whether you're planning a birthday party, wedding, or corporate event, EventPlanner is the perfect tool to help you stay organized and make your event a success.
